_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "businesses" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NOT NULL, "street_address" TEXT NOT NULL, "city" TEXT NOT NULL, "state" TEXT NOT NULL, "country" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_verified" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_verified" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, "total_traders" INTEGER NOT NULL, "about" TEXT NOT NULL, "cover_image" TEXT NOT NULL, "roi" INTEGER NOT NULL, "min_investment" INTEGER NOT NULL, "city" TEXT NOT NULL, "state" TEXT NOT NULL, "country" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "branch" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_head_office" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_head_office" IN (0, 1)), "phone" TEXT NOT NULL, "street_address" TEXT NOT NULL, "city" TEXT NOT NULL, "state" TEXT NOT NULL, "country" TEXT NOT NULL, "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES businesses (id), "collection_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES collection (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "product_category" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "global_product" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "normalized_name" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, "barcode" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "image_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "product_category_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES product_category (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "product" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, "bulk_unit_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "piece_unit_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "units_per_bulk" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "cost_price_per_unit" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selling_price_per_piece" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selling_price_per_bulk" INTEGER NOT NULL, "category" TEXT NOT NULL, "image_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "reviews" TEXT NOT NULL, "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), "global_product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES global_product (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "spine_batch" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "expiry_date" TEXT NULL, "batch_number" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "cost_price_per_unit" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selling_price_per_piece" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selling_price_per_bulk" INTEGER NOT NULL, "initial_quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "remaining_quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "user_name" TEXT NULL, "first_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "last_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "email" TEXT NOT NULL, "password" TEXT NOT NULL, "role" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_email_verified" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_email_verified" IN (0, 1)), "is_verified" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_verified" IN (0, 1)), "avatar" TEXT NULL, "credit_score" INTEGER NOT NULL, "credit_score_status" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "business_verification" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "doc_number" TEXT NULL, "doc_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "rejection_reason" TEXT NOT NULL, "reviewed_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES businesses (id), "submitted_by" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user (id), "reviewed_by" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inventory" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), "batch_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES spine_batch (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "customer" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sales" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "total_amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "amount_paid" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "balance" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "payment_method" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "note" TEXT NULL, "customer_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES customer (id), "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), "created_by" TEXT NULL REFERENCES user (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "payments" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "reference" TEXT NULL, "payment_method" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sale_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sales (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "product_image" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "local_path" TEXT NULL, "remote_url" TEXT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_adjustment" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "reason" TEXT NOT NULL, "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), "created_by" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_adjustment_item" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "adjustment_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stock_adjustment (id), "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sales_item" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "unit_price" INTEGER NOT NULL, "cost_price" INTEGER NOT NULL, "total" INTEGER NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "sale_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sales (id), "product_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "batch_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES spine_batch (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "business_user" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "role" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "has_full_access" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("has_full_access" IN (0, 1)), "joined_at" TEXT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES user (id), "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES businesses (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_movement" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "reference_id" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), "batch_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES spine_batch (id), "created_by" TEXT NULL REFERENCES user (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_transfer" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "reason" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_by" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user (id), "from_branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), "to_branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_transfer_item" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "transfer_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stock_transfer (id), "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cluster" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "about" TEXT NOT NULL, "duration" INTEGER NOT NULL, "roi" INTEGER NOT NULL, "total_funds_raised" INTEGER NOT NULL, "target_fund_raising_amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "repayment" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "cover_image" TEXT NOT NULL, "start_date" TEXT NOT NULL, "end_date" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, "collection_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES collection (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "branch_user" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "role" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "assigned_at" TEXT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES user (id), "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES branch (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "verification_token" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "token" TEXT NOT NULL, "expires_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user_verification" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "id_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "id_image_front_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "id_image_back_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "rejection_reason" TEXT NOT NULL, "submitted_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "reviewed_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "reviewed_by" TEXT NULL REFERENCES user (id), "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "invites" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "email" TEXT NOT NULL, "role" TEXT NOT NULL, "token" TEXT NOT NULL, "accepted" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("accepted" IN (0, 1)), "expires_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES businesses (id), "invited_by" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "bank_details" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES branch (id), "bank_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "account_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "account_number" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
